chunks.title: Judgment on City Rulers
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the twenty-five men followed by Yahweh's oracle against them and the immediate death of Pelatiah.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: Yahweh's response to Ezekiel's prayer concerning the exiles, promising a new heart and return to the land.

chunks.title: Departure of Glory
chunks.reason: The visual departure of God's glory from Jerusalem and the prophet's return to the exiles.
